creator: freebsd@toyingwithfate.com
text: I git cloned /usr/src and did a make of /usr/src/tools/tools/usbtest. I run the built usbtest as root, I select the first drive in the USB enclosure, go into the "Mass Storage" section, toggle I/O mode to "Read and Write", set the "test duration" to 7000, then "start test", but I immediately get "Could not find USB endpoints". I've poked around in the menus but didn't find anything that changed that outcome. I couldn't find any documentation for the tool either. Sorry to demand hand-holding, but what am I missing here?
